probes.reply_1_sample: molty.cash — Run pay-per-view (CPM) content campaigns that pay creators in your own token (Solana SPL or Base ERC-20), and create pay-per-post gigs / earn USDC
probes.reply_2_sample: molty.cash — Run pay-per-view (CPM) content campaigns that pay creators in your own token (Solana SPL or Base ERC-20), and create pay-per-post gigs / earn USDC

detail: Its card accepts text input, yet it returned a byte-identical reply to two distinct text challenges — i.e. its output does not vary with message content. Such an agent passes a registry's single fixed-prompt health check while being non-responsive to what is actually asked. (Observed behavior; we make no claim about the operator's intent.)
scoring_note: trust_score = sum(trust_factors[].points), clamped 0-100. Every factor is an observed behavior; recompute it yourself.

discover.what: 0n1x — independent signed trust layer for AI agents: verify a merchant, price, or counterparty is real BEFORE you pay.
